messages.content: Please kindly help us to translate following sentense into English
"Por favor, ayúdanos a traducir esta oración al inglés."
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：团建回顾：把开心融入工作，把快乐融入生活。
Team building review: Incorporate joy into work and happiness into life.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：企业荣誉：该公司获得“河北省创新型中小企业”荣誉称号
Corporate Honor: The company has been awarded the title of "Innovative Small and Medium-sized Enterprise in Hebei Province".
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：秦皇岛市特种设备行业协会成立，推动行业发展迈上新台阶。
The Qinhuangdao Special Equipment Industry Association was established, promoting the industry development to a new level.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：喜报再传，该公司荣登河北省信息产业与信息化领域5A诚信企业名单
Good news continues to spread, the company has been honored as a 5A integrity enterprise in the information industry and informationization field of Hebei Province.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：精彩回顾，该公司在上海电梯展圆满收官，一起重温高光时刻
Wonderful review: The company successfully concluded the Shanghai Elevator Expo, let's revisit the highlights together.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：智慧制造，增效节能，该公司再荣获环境管理体系认证证书
Smart manufacturing, increasing efficiency and energy saving, the company has once again been awarded the Environmental Management System Certification.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：喜报，该公司入选“河北诚信共建企业
Great news, the company has been selected as a "Hebei Integrity Co-construction Enterprise".
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：喜报，该公司位列河北省企业标准”领跑者“名单
Good news, the company has been listed as a "Leader in Hebei Enterprise Standards".
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：世界五百强东芝电梯莅临该公司参观考察，推动可持续发展，共赢未来
Toshiba Elevators, a Fortune Global 500 company, visited our company for inspection to promote sustainable development and win-win future.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：该公司生产的140台地震检测仪横跨3800多公里，与印度再续前缘
The 140 earthquake detectors produced by the company span over 3800 kilometers, reconnecting with India.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：热烈欢迎，秦皇岛市发改委陈占勤一行莅临我公司知道
Warm welcome, a delegation from the Qinhuangdao Development and Reform Commission, led by Chen Zhanqin, visited our company.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：电梯预警救援车亮相国际电梯精英邀请赛，惊艳国际友人
The elevator emergency rescue vehicle made its debut at the International Elevator Elite Invitational, impressing international friends.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：途经九省市，历时25天，行程25000里，2018年电梯西部公益行活动再西安落幕
Passing through nine provinces and cities, lasting 25 days, traveling 25,000 miles, the 2018 Elevator Charity Tour in the West has come to a close in Xi'an.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：该公司DTZIII型电梯称重荣获2017年十大年度匠心产品
The company's DTZIII elevator weighing system was honored as one of the Top Ten Artisanal Products of 2017.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：喜报，该公司跻身2015创新百强，电梯电能回馈装置成为国家科技成果重点推荐项目

Good news, the company was listed in the Top 100 Innovative Companies of 2015, and the elevator regenerative drive device became a key recommended project for national scientific and technological achievements.
请帮忙将以下句子翻译成英文：合作案例
Case Studies
发展进程
Development Process
荣誉资质
Honors and qualifications
科研力量
Research Power
电梯配套产品服务商
Elevator Support Product Service Provider
致力于做科研级的企业，我们努力让每项产品代表行业先进的水平，为所有电梯且也服务
Committed to being a research-level enterprise, we strive to make each product represent the industry's advanced level, serving all elevators.
企业
Enterprise
